title: NebsConfigLib
description: A config library used by some of my mods
body:
# NebsConfigLib - User Guide

A lightweight configuration library for Fabric mods.

## What is this?

NebsConfigLib is a library mod that other mods use to create their configuration screens. You don't interact with this mod directly - it works behind the scenes to provide a consistent, clean settings experience for mods that depend on it.

If a mod you want to use lists NebsConfigLib as a dependency, you'll need to install it.

## Installation

1. Download the correct version for your Minecraft version (see table below)
2. Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder
3. Launch Minecraft with Fabric Loader
